variants.name: directive_baseline_retest
variants.description: Baseline retest of the generated strategy before directive variants.
entry_long: Require trend/confirmation alignment on bar close.
Require thesis regime match before long entry.
entry_short: Require inverse trend/confirmation alignment on bar close.
Reject short if thesis regime does not support reversal.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Outcome-guided experiment: Apply GATE_ADJUST with params={"max_drawdown_cap": 0.2, "risk_gate_required": true}
Outcome-guided experiment: Apply TEMPLATE_SWITCH with params={"reason": "all_regimes_underperform", "target": "FALLBACK_TEMPLATE_TREND"}
exit_rules: Exit on max bars in trade threshold.
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Range-bound chop erodes edge
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Signal lag after volatility shock
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Indicator disagreement at entry
risk_rules: Risk note: ATR placeholder used for backtester compatibility when discretionary/swing stop is implied.
Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
Take profit objective maps to ATR multiple for deterministic execution.
Outcome-guided experiment: Apply GATE_ADJUST with params={"max_drawdown_cap": 0.2, "risk_gate_required": true}
Outcome-guided experiment: Apply TEMPLATE_SWITCH with params={"reason": "all_regimes_underperform", "target": "FALLBACK_TEMPLATE_TREND"}
Avoid prior failure pattern: Trade count below gate: 0 < 20

advisory_context.coverage_option: Optional (non-blocking): expand qualified strategies to multi-asset and/or multi-timeframe test matrix when confidence is high.
